# Jose Palacios

Jose Palacios is a junior software developer focused on Artificial Intelligence, Bitcoin infrastructure, Lightning Network systems, and gamified learning experiences.

He works on:
- AI automation systems
- Bitcoin infrastructure
- Lightning Network education
- Interactive learning platforms
- Visual-first software experiences
- Automation workflows

Official website:
https://most-improve123.github.io/jose_biography.github.io/

Profiles:
https://github.com/net-blip
